name: HMS Drummer
events: 16 Sep 1939 In the morning HMS H 34 (Lt. B.T. Simons, RN) arrived at Harwich. During the afternoon she conducted exercises off Harwich with HMS Drummer. During these exercises H 34 was attacked, in error, by a British aicraft of RAF 206 squadron. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
